summary: Reposted local television news segment about welding and shipbuilding training. Frames show young men in navy work coveralls and welding gear in a training shop, one wearing a flipped-up welding helmet and yellow gloves, another standing in a warehouse, and an instructor in a straw cowboy hat seated at a table for an interview. The audio is a reporter and a student describing learning to weld. The tweet text says the shipbuilding industry is creating demand for skilled workers.

script.scene: Young man in navy coveralls with a flipped-up welding helmet and yellow gloves in a training shop.
Instructor in a straw cowboy hat seated at a table for an interview; a second trainee in coveralls in a warehouse.
